title: styrax suberifolius var. hayataianus
intro: Styrax suberifolius var. hayataianus, also known as Korean styrax, is a plant species within the family Styracaceae, characterized by its fragrant resin and aromatic wood. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant's resin is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, Korean styrax resin is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in aromatherapy applications to promote relaxation and well-being.
